LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SHERRILL DEL GUIDICE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT PAY PLAINTIFF FEES AND COSTS INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF IN PROCURING THE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND IN OPPOSING THE FIRST TWO UNSUCCESSFUL MOTIONS FOR RELIEF. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE A DECLARATION DETAILING SUCH FEES AND COSTS BY APRIL 2, 2008. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A RESPONSE BY APRIL 7, 2008 AND THE COURT WILL HOLD A CONTINUED HEARING TO DETERMINE THE AMOUNT ON APRIL 9, 2008. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. DEFENDANTS ROSA FUNG AND VICTOR FUNG SHALL RECOVER COSTS TO BE DETERMINED BY A COSTS MEMORANDUM AND ANY POST-JUDGMENT PROCEEDING REGARDING THE AWARD OF COSTS PER THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND THE CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. RAYMOND H. LEVY, TEL. NO. 753-8080 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. BURKE HANSEN, TEL. NO. 771-6174 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SHERRILL DEL GUIDICE AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT SHERRILL DEL GUIDICE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT BASED ON EXCUSABLE MISTAKE OR NEGLECT OF COUNSEL, FEES GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,445.73, NO SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION FILED. FEES TO BE PAID BY THE END OF BUSINESS DAY OF APRIL 14, 2008 AND IF NOT DEFENDANT ANSWER AND CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED ON APRIL 7, 2008 SHALL BE STRICKEN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Continued To Apr-09-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
BURKE HANSEN, ESQ., (415)771-6174, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY SHERRILL DEL GUIDICE
RAYMOND H. LEVY, ESQ., (415)753-8080, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY MYRA PARJAN

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SHERRILL DEL GUIDICE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT PAY PLAINTIFF FEES AND COSTS INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF IN PROCURING THE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND IN OPPOSING THE FIRST TWO UNSUCCESSFUL MOTIONS FOR RELIEF. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE A DECLARATION DETAILING SUCH FEES AND COSTS BY APRIL 2, 2008. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A RESPONSE BY APRIL 7, 2008 AND THE COURT WILL HOLD A CONTINUED HEARING TO DETERMINE THE AMOUNT ON APRIL 9, 2008. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/PM

Amended Motion And Ntc Of Motion For Order Setting Aside Default; Declaration; Memo Of P And A

ATTY. BURKE HANSEN, TEL. NO. 771-6174 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT SHERRILL DEL GUIDICE'S Amended Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Default IS DENIED.
